task_description: Implement a Neighborhood Explorer freemium feature using Google Maps Platform APIs. Includes server-side API routes for place search and geocoding with rate limiting, a client component with freemium gating and embedded Google Map, a standalone page, CTAs on existing calculator pages, and Maps Embed on city pages.

verification.summary: npx tsc --noEmit passes cleanly. npm run build succeeds. Review fixes applied: parallelized Places API calls with Promise.allSettled, conditionally render Maps iframe only for Pro users, redacted API key from FEAT-001.json.
